text:
Ininge City (, Ininge-shi) is a city within the Republic of Rokario. 

Overview

Ininge is a city that's located in the Republic of Rokario. 

Plot

Chimera Ant arc

Ininge City's location appears on Killua's Beatle-07 map. 

Trivia

The name of the city is transliterated as Inninge City in Crunchyroll's version/translation.
